relevant_files.rationale: Primary data source defining BLIND_BOX_SCENE_ENTRIES, BLIND_BOX_ITEM_POOL_BUNDLES, runtime BLIND_BOXES, and compatibility mapping.
Regression suite enforcing 20 scene entries, four-pool schema, 50 unique items per pool, compatibility mapping, and blocked pattern checks.
Local maintainer rules for blind-box data, including write-library acceptance criteria and document sync expectations.
Repository-level stable rules and file responsibility guide.
Prompt entry tied to blind-box category IDs; only needs updates if category semantics or IDs change.

existing_patterns: BLIND_BOX_ITEM_POOL_BUNDLES is the authoritative four-pool data source.
BLIND_BOXES is derived from core_items + scene_expansion_items for runtime large items.
Tests expect exactly 50 unique strings in every pool for every scene.
Documentation says scene expansion items must be recognizable, bounded, independently circleable, and not dependent on light/reflection/transparent/tiny traces.
architecture_constraints: Data-only change preferred; avoid changing UI or runtime extraction logic.
Do not change category IDs or four-pool keys.
Risk words and quality rules should be enforceable by tests or lightweight checks where possible.
Chinese content files must remain UTF-8.
integration_points: draw_history.json histories are keyed by runtime box/category and should remain compatible.
